question: The chart shows browser usage share by product. Which statement is supported by the chart data?

options.A: Others has the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.B: Edge accounts for more than half of the market.
options.C: Chrome and Firefox together have a higher share than Safari.
options.D: Edge has the largest market share among the categories shown.

explanation: From the labels, Edge has the highest share (95%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Edge is largest when relying on visual comparison.
